subject: Build inventory, transaction history, user management, and settings pages
goal: Implement InventoryManagementPage (S-011) with stock overview table, restock/adjust modals, movement history drawer. Implement TransactionHistoryPage (S-012) with advanced filter bar, summary stats, transaction detail modal with print, export to Excel. Implement UserManagementPage (S-013) with user list, create/edit form, permission checklist panel. Implement SystemSettingsPage (S-017) with PPN toggle/rate, payment method configs, discount management, restaurant info, receipt settings.

business_rules.rule: Stock deduction is triggered automatically when an order is confirmed
Only authorized users can manually adjust stock (restock or correction)
Only Owner can access the access control panel
PPN rate is configurable by owner in system settings
Changes to PPN rate apply to new transactions only, not retroactively
Discount applied BEFORE PPN calculation: Grand Total = (Subtotal - Discount) + PPN
Only one discount per order (prevent stacking)

F-004: Owner can view all inventory items with current stock levels
Stock auto-decreases when orders are placed based on recipe ingredients
System shows stock movement history (in/out log)
F-012: System shows a warning badge when any item is below threshold
Owner can set minimum threshold per inventory item
Low stock items are highlighted in the inventory view
Dashboard shows count of low-stock items
F-011: Transaction table shows: date/time, ID, table, Shift ID, PIC Kasir, subtotal, PPN, total, payment method
Transactions can be filtered by: date range, transaction ID, PIC Kasir, Shift ID, payment method, total range
All filters are combinable and have a reset button
Summary stats update with active filters
Each transaction shows full detail modal with PPN breakdown and Print Struk button
Filtered data can be exported to Excel (.xlsx)
Transaction data cannot be deleted by non-owner users
F-013: Export button on Transaction History generates Excel file
Loading indicator shown during export generation
F-008: Owner can view a list of all users with their current permissions
Owner can toggle each permission on/off via checkboxes
Changes apply immediately without requiring user to re-login
Default permissions are pre-set based on role but fully customizable
F-016: Owner can access POS Settings from admin panel or Dashboard Hub
Owner can set PPN rate percentage
F-018: Owner can create/edit/deactivate discount rules in settings
Active promos shown as banner cards on order creation screen
Discount picker shows all active discounts with calculated amount
Payment shows: Subtotal -> Diskon -> Subtotal setelah diskon -> PPN -> Grand Total
